content.en:
Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Ye Tian has been guarding the forbidden spring water during this time, and this place is also suitable for cultivation anyway.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian sensed the fluctuations of the Peerless Domain Ancestor.

"Sure enough, there is no superior domain ancestor who has crossed the dark forbidden realm!"

Ye Tian immediately blocked the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and immediately copied his body out of the Forbidden Ancestral Spring, while the main body was still guarding here, so as to ensure that the Xuanxu Saint Realm would not be stolen.

Bang!!!!

Outside the Xuanxu Saint Realm, Ye Tian stopped a peerless domain ancestor shuttling in with one hand.

Rumble!!!

Ye Tian punched out and directly knocked the other party out of time and space.

"Black Striped Holy Ancestor, it's you, your Immortal Holy Gate is trying to snatch the Forbidden Ancestral Spring?"

Ye Tian asked.

"That's right, Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, you hand over the Forbidden Ancestral Spring, although your strength is comparable to that of a Peerless Domain Ancestor, but I am not an ordinary Peerless Domain Ancestor, so you can't stop it. If you stop me, be careful that I step on your Xuanxu Holy Realm today!"

The Black Striped Saint Ancestor threatened.

"Then let's fight, see if my Xuanxu Saint Realm is trampled by you, or if I kill you today!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"Arrogance!"

The Black-veined Saint Ancestor was furious.

Bang!!!!!

A black light appeared on the body of the Black Striped Saint Ancestor, turning into a strange stone statue.

This is his special ancestral skill - the real body of the stone statue!

As long as the ancestral skill is not broken, all the injuries inflicted on him by the enemy will be transferred to the stone statue, but his body will not have any injuries.

Moreover, the true body of the stone statue can increase his physical strength and physical defense by ten times, so this ancestral skill is very terrifying, and it is also his reliance.

"False Slash!"

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and directly used the space ancestral technique of the consummation realm.

Tear and pull!

Billions of territory time and space shattered, and the terrifying void slash seemed to be able to cut off all the Great Dao time and space, and directly bombarded the Black Pattern Saint Ancestor.

Click!

The stone statue behind the Black Striped Saint Ancestor was directly cracked, and a huge crack lay there, even difficult to heal.

"How is it possible to slash an ancestral technique, and it is an ancestral technique of the consummation realm, how can you raise an ancestral technique to the consummation realm?"

The Black-veined Saint Ancestor was stunned.

At the beginning, the battle between Ye Tian and Jinchen Holy Ancestor, the picture was spread out, and he had also seen it.

Ye Tian does know a lot of ancestral skills, but they are all small-level ancestral skills.

It's okay to raise the ancestral skill to the difficulty of Xiaocheng, but if you want to upgrade to the Dacheng level and the consummation realm, the difficulty is too exaggerated.

He hadn't seen a few Superior Domain Ancestors who could cultivate an ancestral technique to the consummation realm.

Moreover, Ye Tian's cultivation is different now.

Ye Tian did not completely control the physical body at the beginning, but now he has not only completely controlled the physical body, but also completed two invincible domain body transformations.

"This ...... Where is there such a fast ascension speed, even if he has been cultivating in the Time Great Array, giving the best resources, and even being personally guided by an ancestor-level existence, it is impossible to have such a fast cultivation ascension speed!"

The Black Striped Saint Ancestor was completely dumbfounded, and he couldn't believe it at all.

Abrupt!

The golden rays turned into silk threads and cut through his body.

Each golden thread was like the full force of a peerless domain ancestor, and under so many golden wire attacks, he had no way to resist at all.

At the same time, Ye Tian's Void Slashing Ancestor Technique struck a blow from time to time, causing his stone statue to crack continuously.

Click!

The true body of the stone statue is about to be shattered, once this ancestral technique is broken, with his body, he will not be able to stop Ye Tian at all, and he will soon be wiped out by Ye Tian without a superior domain body.

At this time, the Black-veined Saint Ancestor gritted his teeth and took out a small gray ball.

He crushed the gray ball, and suddenly a gray light shield protected him, no matter how powerful Ye Tian's void slash was, he couldn't shake this gray light mask.

"Can't break it?"

Ye Tian frowned.

Immediately, he directly performed the ancestral skill of the Five Elements Ban.

"Seal!"

The Five Elements Prohibition directly extracted the power of the Five Elements Forbidden Avenue in this area, forcibly suppressed it on this gray light mask, and the layers of bans compressed this area into a small ball, which appeared in Ye Tian's hands.

And the Black-veined Saint Ancestor was sealed on this five-element forbidden ball, although he couldn't break through the gray light shield of the Black-veined Saint Ancestor, but the Black-veined Saint Ancestor couldn't get out.

In the future, he could attack the gray mask again and again, and after a long period of attack, he didn't believe that the gray mask could not be broken.

False slash!

False slash!

False slash!

Ye Tian attacked again and again, anyway, he was not afraid of wasting time.

Inside the gray reticle.

The Black Pattern Saint Ancestor also knew that he was sealed by Ye Tian, and when he sensed that Ye Tian was constantly attacking the gray light mask, he immediately became anxious.

This gray light mask was transformed by the gray ball, it was a special holy relic, which he occasionally obtained from traveling through the Dark Forbidden Domain, and it could defend against the full force of the top peerless domain ancestor, and even resist the full force of the half-step ancestor.

Even if he attacked this gray mask, he would have to attack at least hundreds of thousands of years before he could hope to break it.

But at this moment, he felt that Ye Tian's attack was too terrifying, and this gray light mask would last for ten years at most.

"Help, help!"

The Black Striped Saint Ancestor panicked.

------------------

Immortal Holy Gate, a certain territory, the Black Vein Holy Ancestor also has a weaker incarnation sitting here.

This avatar immediately headed for the Immortal Ancestral Realm.

"Black Vein Holy Ancestor, what's the situation?"

A peerless domain ancestor of the Immortal Holy Gate asked.

"My true body was sealed by the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Law Domain, and his strength is many times stronger than at the beginning, and he even has the ancestral skill of the Consummation Realm. I must beg the Ancestor to save me, or I will surely die!" said the Black Veined Saint Ancestor urgently.

"What, you're sealed?"

One of the peerless domain ancestors was shocked.

"Immortal Ancestor, save me!"

The Black-veined Holy Ancestor knelt at the door of the Immortal Ancestor's main hall and prayed.

"I see!" the voice of the Immortal Ancestor came, "I am the Ancestor after all, and it is inconvenient for me to make a move against an Invincible Domain Ancestor. In this way, I'll go find the Zhan Ancestor of the Battle Gate, and let him persuade the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor to let you go!"

"Thank you, Immortal Ancestor!"

The Black Striped Saint Ancestor hurriedly thanked.

Rumble!!!!!

The incarnation of the Immortal Ancestor condensed a trace of thought, crossed the long river of time and space, and came to the War Ancestor Realm.

And for the first time, Zhan Zu also sensed it, and met with the idea of the Immortal Ancestor.

"Immortal Ancestor, what's wrong, why did you suddenly come to me?"

Zhan Zu asked curiously.

"War Ancestor, let the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors of your Battle Gate release the Black Pattern Saint Ancestor, and you can open it!" said the Immortal Ancestor.
